chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-4541 of 2020 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For order on office objection No.1 2. For order on CMA No.19133/2020 (Stay) 3. For hearing of main case 22.1.2026 None present for the petitioner --------------------- This Court vide order dated 23.9.2020, directed learned counsel for the petitioner to file a copy of the judgment of the Supreme Court in response whereof allegedly the impugned notice was issued. However, no compliance has been made; therefore, this Court is left with no option but to dismiss this lis in non-prosecution. Accordingly, the instant petition is dismissed for non- prosecution alongwith pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Zahid/*
